name: Mom's Southern Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge rinsed chicken pieces in flour mixed with seasonings.
2. Place the dredged chicken in hot fat in a large skillet.
3. Do not crowd the skillet.
4. Cover and cook over low heat for 15-20 minutes.
5. Uncover and turn the temperature up to medium-high.
6. Fry, turning and tossing occasionally until crisp and brown.
7. Remove the chicken to a paper towel-lined platter.
8. Season lightly with salt.
